TextENGNew: "Thank you everyone for your hard work reading this "Higurashi When They Cry" Advanced Story chapter, "Someutsushi."@k@vS20/38/VTP_tamako1002. What did you think of this story, composed entirely of new characters?"
"This chapter was based on a popular arc "Onisarashi-hen" from the "Higurashi When They Cry" manga."
"It's a little different from the main series, but it would make me very happy if you enjoyed it."

"Hey, hold on!@k@vS20/37/VTP_chisato1002. Enjoy it? Our hero Natsumi died in the worst possible bad ending!@k@vS20/37/VTP_chisato1003. What is there to enjoy about that, huh?@k@vS20/37/VTP_chisato1004. And furthermore, Tamako! Who made you the discussion facilitator here?!"
"I don't really understand that myself.@k@vS20/38/VTP_tamako1006. I was just appointed by the director of the console version."

"Well, Natsumi probably would've been too meek to push the proceedings forward, and Chisato would probably tear the content apart, so I guess I was chosen by process of elimination?@k@vS20/38/VTP_tamako1008. Also Akira isn't a very good speaker, so he probably couldn't direct the conversation either."
"...Well excuse me."
"Who are you calling Crusher?!@k@vS20/37/VTP_chisato1006. Hey, Natsumi! Say something in your defense!@k@vS20/37/VTP_chisato1007. Aren't you supposed to be the main character of this story?!"
"Y-you don't have to say that about me~!"
"Even though I was pleased that I was finally promoted from minor character to heroine status, I nearly killed Akira-kun, and then I went insane and died, so I feel depressed about it, even now~!"

"Oh, by the way, Natsumi has several cameos in the main series.@k@vS20/38/VTP_tamako1010. So, your dream to get promoted came true, only to result in this kind of story... Indeed, I can see why that wouldn't sit well with you."

"......You know what?@k@vS20/37/VTP_chisato1009. I've heard rumors that the story of "Higurashi" is just one tragic ending after another.@k@vS20/37/VTP_chisato1010. And that extreme ending left me speechless."
"Oh, is that so?@k@vS20/38/VTP_tamako1012. Then while you're at it, why not keep that silence forever?@k@vS20/38/VTP_tamako1013. That way we can continue living comfortably in a peaceful world."
"You're treating the words I spit out like a pollutant?@k@vS20/37/VTP_chisato1012. Or like some kind of photochemical smog?!"
"...Haah, all right.@k@vS20/39/VTP_akira1003. Chisato, Tama, that's enough."
"Hmph!@k@vS20/37/VTP_chisato1014. I didn't ask for your opinion, you wuss!@k@vS20/37/VTP_chisato1015. You've got a lot of nerve, after failing to save Natsumi!"
"Hold on, stop that Chisato-chan!@k@vS20/36/VTP_natsumi1005. Akira-kun had a rough time, so shouldn't you show him a little more consideration?"
"No Natsumi, you were the one who had the hardest time......"

"Well, Akira-chan just barely managed to survive and had to watch the girl he loves go crazy and die right before his eyes.@k@vS20/38/VTP_tamako1015. For an ordinary person, that would probably scar you for life."

"Well, that's true. If I were in his shoes, that would haunt my dreams for the next three months.@k@vS20/37/VTP_chisato1018. And I'd have to give up on eating meat, I'd probably end up a vegetarian the rest of my life.@k@vS20/37/VTP_chisato1019. Even if I saw a chicken fricassee..."
"You guys...!@k@vS20/39/VTP_akira1006. Can I get a little sympathy here?! You don't have to go all out, but still!"
"Sympathy?@k@vS20/37/VTP_chisato1021. Yeah, sure.@k@vS20/37/VTP_chisato1022. All right then. Dun dun dun dun... dun dun dun dun!"
"Sympathy, not symphony!!"
"Wow, those two syllables make a huge difference.@k@vS20/37/VTP_chisato1024. I'll have to write that one down in my joke book..."
"Listen to me, Chisaaa!!"

"O-oh my, let's calm down.@k@vS20/36/VTP_natsumi1007. Chisato-chan, you're a beautiful lady when you stay silent, but I think you'd be more popular if you behaved in a more discreet way like Tamako-chan tells you to..."
"......Hey, Natsumi.@k@vS20/37/VTP_chisato1026. Are you telling me I'm not beautiful when I'm speaking?"
"Th-th-th-that's not what I meant!@k@vS20/36/VTP_natsumi1009. Chisato-chan, you're looking at this too negatively!!"
"That's such a rude thing to say.@k@vS20/37/VTP_chisato1028. How could you say that about this beautiful young lady, daughter of the hospital director?"
"B-beautiful young lady..."
"Beautiful young lady... I'd write you down as a lady of minimal beauty.@k@vS20/38/VTP_tamako1017. Surely that's the perfect catch phrase for you."
"Whoa whoa whoa, Tama-san!@k@vS20/37/VTP_chisato1030. That was uncalled for!@k@vS20/37/VTP_chisato1031. Do you have some kind of grudge against me?!"
"......Akira-kun.@k@vS20/36/VTP_natsumi1012. Have Chisato-chan and Tamako-chan always been like this?"
"Y-Yeah......@k@vS20/39/VTP_akira1010. Though in the past, they were a bit more...... horrible?"
""Whaaaat?!""
"Uwaah?!"
"At any rate...... I get the stuff about Oyashiro-sama's curse and that a great disaster struck Hinamizawa."
"But what's the deal with this series of tragedies striking the people from Himanizawa one by one, even though they're living in our city far away from the village?"
"Well, even we look at Hinamizawa and its people through colored glasses."

"Yeah, I know we talked about how people from Hinamizawa stand out with their eccentric behavior.@k@vS20/38/VTP_tamako1020. But that behavior only seems to come out in the strongly religious elders, not as much in the rest of the population."

"For example, Natsumi and her mother don't believe in Oyashiro-sama at all.@k@vS20/38/VTP_tamako1022. Plus, they weren't acting abnormally.@k@vS20/38/VTP_tamako1023. Nevertheless, the two of them got caught up in the curse, so doesn't that seem unreasonable?"

"On the other hand, I wonder if they were being punished for not believing?@k@vS20/39/VTP_akira1013. Oh, but in that case old man Hatakeyama and Natsumi's grandmother shouldn't have died.@k@vS20/39/VTP_akira1014. Then, what kind of people is this curse targeting?"
"Indeed, the curse doesn't discriminate......"

"If that's the case, the culprit is not human but simply a curse, I suppose.@k@vS20/37/VTP_chisato1037. If it's due to supernatural phenomena, there's no trick or anything.@k@vS20/37/VTP_chisato1038. But, is it really ok for that to be the solution?"
"Right.@k@vS20/38/VTP_tamako1025. But the director of this arc claims that there is a trick to the title "Someutsushi" that was not in the original "Onisarashi" title, though."
"What's that?"

"Hmmm... The kanji used in the title "Someutsushi" (染伝し) are the characters for "a dye or a stain" (染) and the act of "passing along" (伝).@k@vS20/38/VTP_tamako1027. But, when you write those characters backwards you get "伝染" which means "infection"...... huh?@k@vS20/38/VTP_tamako1028. Then, does that mean the curse is contagious?!"
"Hey, hey, this is no joke......@k@vS20/37/VTP_chisato1041. If a tragedy like this continued to spread for a long time, I don't think my heart could take it~!"
"...There is no such thing as a "curse".@k@vS20/28/VTP_tomoe1002. No way it'd be real."
"Ah, Minai-san. Good afternoon~."
"Good afternoon, everyone.@k@vS20/28/VTP_tomoe1004. Sorry for arriving late."
"Anyway, is everyone here now?@k@vS20/38/VTP_tamako1030. One, two, three...... it's a surprisingly small number of people."

"I think that number will increase as the story continues from here.@k@vS20/28/VTP_tomoe1006. There's my subordinate Fujita-kun, and my sister Madoka.@k@vS20/28/VTP_tomoe1007. Besides, I heard that "those people" are finally going to participate next time."

""Those people"...?@k@vS20/36/VTP_natsumi1016. Ah, you mean those two detectives you look up to, Minai-san!@k@vS20/36/VTP_natsumi1017. I'm sure we'll be able to learn more about the "curse" if they join in!"

"Right.@k@vS20/28/VTP_tomoe1009. I'm sorry that I always arrived too late this time, but I'll do better next time, ok?@k@vS20/28/VTP_tomoe1010. I swear on the honor of the police department that I will catch the culprit."
"Ooooh, you sound so reliable!@k@vS20/37/VTP_chisato1043. Hey, Akira! Make yourself as dependable as her!"
"W-Well excuse me...!@k@vS20/39/VTP_akira1016. I'll do better next time as well!"

"Mmmhmm?@k@vS20/37/VTP_chisato1045. Now that you've said it, you've gotta take responsibility, you hear?@k@vS20/37/VTP_chisato1046. Chii-chan won't be satisfied just teasing you if the same thing happens again, ok?"
"Wait, this is your idea of going easy on him...?"
"Y....Yeah! Leave it to me!@k@vS20/39/VTP_akira1018. I won't sit by and do nothing this time!"
"Yeah! Good luck, Akira-kun!@k@vS20/36/VTP_natsumi1019. And I'll do my best too, to earn our happiness!"
"Yep yep, a young couple each thinking of the person they love. What a beautiful sight!@k@vS20/37/VTP_chisato1048. This is good, good!"
"......I get angry just watching it, though.@k@vS20/28/VTP_tomoe1012. It kind of feels like it's spiting me for being single."
"...Oh by the way, Minai-san?@k@vS20/38/VTP_tamako1033. I received some handwritten notes from the director, and it looks like there's some other person...?"
"Huh, is that so?@k@vS20/37/VTP_chisato1050. Let's see.... Oh, it's true.@k@vS20/37/VTP_chisato1051. Who is this person...?"
"It's fine, just forget about him.@k@vS20/28/VTP_tomoe1015. Right now!@k@vS20/28/VTP_tomoe1016. Immediately!@k@vS20/28/VTP_tomoe1017. Purge it from your minds!!"
"Uh.... what?"

"I don't know!@k@vS20/28/VTP_tomoe1019. I don't know anything!@k@vS20/28/VTP_tomoe1020. I don't want to know!!@k@vS20/28/VTP_tomoe1021. There was no such guy involved in my life, and he never will be!!@k@vS20/28/VTP_tomoe1022. He doesn't exist in this world!!!@k@vS20/28/VTP_tomoe1023. Raaaaaaagh!!!"
"W-what's wrong, Minai-san?!@k@vS20/36/VTP_natsumi1021. You've thrown off your usual cool persona, you know??"
"......It seems like that triggered some weird trauma switch."
"Hey, Tama... this person Minai-san hates so much... do you know who it is?"
"Umm...... the chief of police.@k@vS20/38/VTP_tamako1035. Minai-san's boss at Kakiuchi Station."
"Hmm? There's more.@k@vS20/38/VTP_tamako1037. There's something about Minai-san's sister,@k@|@y@vS20/38/VTP_tamako1038. ...it says she's his "fiancee"?!"
"Noooooo!!!"
"......Hey, I heard that the chief of Kakiuchi Station is really old...... probably around 50?"
"......He's 57 years old."
"So, since the chief is your sister's fiance.... if the two of them get married... then you'd become the chief's sister-in-law, right?"

"Th-this isn't something to joke about!!@k@vS20/28/VTP_tomoe1027. It would be incredibly depressing to have such an old man referring to me as his sister!!@k@vS20/28/VTP_tomoe1028. I'm still single! I'm a beautiful flower, still in my twenties!!!"
"Oh, but you'll be turning 30 next year... Eep?!"
"......If you say anything more, I'll charge you with slandering a police officer and have you sent to the firing squad...!!"
"...Is that really a crime?"
"I'll make it one from now on!!"
"Better yet, if I become a police bureaucrat I can make it so anyone who calls me an "old lady" will receive the death penalty!!"
"And then I'll make laws that prohibit marriage for couples over 20 years apart!!@k@vS20/28/VTP_tomoe1033. Absolutely forbidden!!@k@vS20/28/VTP_tomoe1034. Waaaaaaah!!!"

"Oh...... she's crying.@k@vS20/38/VTP_tamako1041. But still, you'll have to be rather patient, won't you.@k@vS20/38/VTP_tamako1042. Even if things go smoothly, becoming a police bureaucrat will take decades......"
"Minai-san has a surprisingly naive and childish way of thinking, huh...?@k@vS20/37/VTP_chisato1057. Is she really a career-oriented woman?"
"...Hey, Chisa.@k@vS20/39/VTP_akira1021. Still think you can call that... dependable, as you put it?"

"W-well, let's just leave it at that......@k@vS20/38/VTP_tamako1044. Anyway, let's get started.@k@vS20/38/VTP_tamako1045. This will be our first bonding session as the cast of the "Higurashi" Advanced Story series, won't it?"

"Yeah, you've got a point.@k@vS20/37/VTP_chisato1059. Well then, I'll pass out drinks for everyone.@k@vS20/37/VTP_chisato1060. Since we're all just students, it'll be juice for us...@k@vS20/37/VTP_chisato1061. Minai-san, would you like a beer?"
"...Oh, I'm fine with juice, thanks.@k@vS20/28/VTP_tomoe1036. I only drink alcohol when I need to drown my sorrows."
"...Don't bring down the mood, please."
"Does everyone have a glass?@k@vS20/38/VTP_tamako1047. All right then, I'll take the lead.@k@vS20/38/VTP_tamako1048. Well...... with "Someutsushi" complete, thanks everyone for your hard work~!!"
""Thanks, everyone~~~!!""
*clap clap clap*

"Well, I'd like to briefly look back on the scenario now.@k@vS20/38/VTP_tamako1050. Minai-san told us a little while ago that there is no such thing as a "curse".@k@vS20/38/VTP_tamako1051. Could you explain what you meant by that?"

"Well, you see.@k@vS20/28/VTP_tomoe1039. Actually, I didn't really believe in supernatural phenomena to begin with, but the incidents of this case in particular have given me confidence that there must be some trick to the "curse"."
"Ohhh...?@k@vS20/37/VTP_chisato1065. What is your basis for that?"

"I guess you all don't know about the case of the woman's burned body found in the mountains.@k@vS20/28/VTP_tomoe1041. By the time it was revealed that it was a murder by the "curse" or possibly by suicide, the chances of a supernatural agent being involved went to zero for me."
"......Huh?@k@vS20/36/VTP_natsumi1025. What do you mean by that?"
"It's something I've learned while studying criminal psychology.@k@vS20/28/VTP_tomoe1043. Choosing fire for murder, or choosing to die by fire is an extremely civilized method, unique to humans."
"Unique to humans......?"

"For example, human beings are the only creatures on Earth that use fire as a tool.@k@vS20/28/VTP_tomoe1045. That just goes to show how difficult fire is to handle and how it instinctively evokes fear."
"Thus, when perpetrators use it...@k@vS20/28/VTP_tomoe1047. they dare to assert that they are human, don't you think?"
"It's said to be a clear declaration of their intentions and emotions.@k@vS20/28/VTP_tomoe1049. With that in mind, it's not a method that some spiritual entity such as a "curse" would ever use."

"...Um, sorry, Minai-san.@k@vS20/37/VTP_chisato1067. Could you explain it in a slightly more straightforward way?@k@vS20/37/VTP_chisato1068. It's difficult to see how that incident is related to the events around Natsumi..."

"Oh, I'm sorry.@k@vS20/28/VTP_tomoe1051. Then let me explain all the events tied to the "curse," step by step. After the Watanagashi festival was held on the evening of June 19th, a victim was burned like an offering to a god."

"A few days later, the corpse of "Oyashiro-sama's" shrine maiden was discovered.@k@vS20/28/VTP_tomoe1053. And the next day, the curse culminated in the volcanic gas disaster that struck Hinamizawa village."
"Also, from that point on people from Hinamizawa began exhibiting delusions and abnormal behavior directed toward "Oyashiro-sama," followed by frequent cases of violence..."

"Hmm......@k@vS20/38/VTP_tamako1053. It does seem a bit of a cop-out to simply accept the supernatural explanation, but no matter how I think about it, the only thing that makes sense is that something supernatural is going on behind the scenes."
"Indeed, if you look at all four cases as a unit, you can't help but think that.@k@vS20/28/VTP_tomoe1056. However, what if we look at each individually?"
"Hmm.@k@vS20/36/VTP_natsumi1027. ......Ah? Then maybe..."
"Did you realize something, Natsumi?"
"Yeah. I thought about what happened and who was affected in each of these four incidents."
"In the first incident, the discovery of the victims made more people believe in the "curse" and deepened their faith in "Oyashiro-sama", didn't it?"

"......But the second incident was the murder of Oyashiro-sama's shrine maiden, who should have been the person most respected by Oyashiro-sama.@k@vS20/36/VTP_natsumi1033. If the purpose of the incidents was to make people believe in Oyashiro-sama, wouldn't that have the opposite effect?"
"Eh? Huh? What do you mean?@k@vS20/37/VTP_chisato1071. Could you explain that in a way Chii-chan can understand~?"
"In other words, the reason that the curse rains "divine wrath" down on nonbelievers is supposed to be to make an example of what happens to those who don't believe in Oyashiro-sama, right?"
"Yeah... now that you mention it, it is strange.@k@vS20/39/VTP_akira1025. It also plants faith in the followers, but this is something else altogether..."
"And then in the third incident.@k@vS20/38/VTP_tamako1057. The curse fell upon all of the villagers and even destroyed the faithful among them."
"Unlike the biblical story of Noah's Ark, where God supposedly saved his devout followers."

"It's the same in the fourth incident, the murderous behavior of people from Hinamizawa.@k@vS20/39/VTP_akira1027. Believers and nonbelievers were both caught up in the tragedy, which makes everyone start to think that getting involved with "Oyashiro-sama" is dangerous."
"Which would mean that "Oyashiro-sama" is trying to push his own followers away?@k@vS20/39/VTP_akira1029. ...No matter how you think about that, it sounds strange."
".........In other words, Minai-san's assertion is that the "curse" is not caused by "Oyashiro-sama's" will?"
"I have a rather materialist mindset.@k@vS20/28/VTP_tomoe1058. So I don't think a god would do something that wouldn't be of any benefit to them."
"That means this series of tragedies is using fear to mislead people, and is actually the work of humans doing this in "Oyashiro-sama's" name."
"......However, I don't have any solid evidence of that, yet."
"Well, Minai-san.@k@vS20/36/VTP_natsumi1035. If you believe there is a "human" culprit...... do you think there is someone who would benefit from this tragedy?"

"Yes.@k@vS20/28/VTP_tomoe1062. There is always someone who benefits from a crime.@k@vS20/28/VTP_tomoe1063. If we can clarify that benefit, then naturally, we'll get a better idea of the intentions of the people involved and who they are."
"And I think there is some secret hidden in the original burning case, where the criminal's psychology is clearly visible."
"Unfortunately, during "Someutsushi" we weren't able to investigate the incident ourselves.@k@vS20/28/VTP_tomoe1066. But next time, we'll examine the contents and find the truth."
"Good luck, Minai-san!@k@vS20/36/VTP_natsumi1037. I'm looking forward to seeing you play an active and reliable role next time!"
"Ahahaha, leave it to me!"

"...Well beyond that, Minai-san has another problem to clean up.@k@vS20/37/VTP_chisato1074. About her little sister,@k@vS20/37/VTP_chisato1075. her little sister...@k@vS20/37/VTP_chisato1076. and her elderly brother-in-law..."
"Waaaaaaah!!@k@vS20/28/VTP_tomoe1069. Stop saying thaaaaat!!!"
"Man~, now isn't that a juicy little story.@k@vS20/37/VTP_chisato1078. I'll be able to make use of it for a while♪."
"Chisato... are you a demon...?"
"......Well, at this point there are still too many missing details and unknown variables to determine if the curse is the work of humans or not."

"So, I think it will be really important to collect information from those detectives familiar with Hinamizawa next time.@k@vS20/37/VTP_chisato1081. Then maybe we can build our reasoning on top of that?"

"That's right.@k@vS20/39/VTP_akira1031. Minai-san's views sound reasonable, but there is not enough evidence at this stage to back her up.@k@vS20/39/VTP_akira1032. I'd like to get more information from other cases."

"......It seems that there are several additional chapters that will come out.@k@vS20/28/VTP_tomoe1071. If we read them carefully while comparing them to the main series, maybe we can shine a light on this mystery."
"That's right.@k@vS20/36/VTP_natsumi1039. Well then, I'm looking forward to the next chapter, "Kageboushi." Maybe we should re-read the previous chapters until then?"
"That's it, then. Please look forward to reading the next chapters~."
